title: Spendify - Personal Finance Dashboard
desc: A polished personal finance dashboard for tracking income, expenses, budgets, savings goals, and transaction activity through a clean analytics-focused interface.
summary: Spendify is a frontend-first finance product built with the Next.js App Router. It brings together summary stat cards, yearly income-versus-expense charts, category breakdown visuals, budget tracking, savings goals, and transaction views inside a responsive dashboard shell.
highlights: Finance overview dashboard with income, expense, and savings stat cards
Interactive analytics using Recharts for category and monthly trend visualisation
Dedicated budgets, goals, and transactions views inside a reusable app shell

title: Magnus Skill Mart
desc: An NFT-inspired Web3 marketplace for skills and digital services, with wallet integration, mobile-responsive design, and a premium dark UI.
summary: Magnus Skill Mart merges the aesthetics of NFT marketplaces with a practical skills trading platform. Built for magnus-skills-mart.com with full Web3 wallet connection, responsive layouts, and a bold visual identity.
highlights: Web3 wallet connection and on-chain skill verification
NFT-style skill card marketplace with filtering
Full mobile responsiveness across all breakpoints
